title: Mace Overlay
description: A clean mace overlay texture pack with distinct designs for each variant. Density mace features a green style, while Breach mace uses a bold yellow look, improving visibility and giving a sharper, more defined PvP experience.
body:
# Mace Overlay Texture Pack

**Overview**
_A clean and optimized mace overlay pack designed to enhance visibility and gameplay with distinct textures for each variant._

## Features
## 
- Custom overlay for maces
- Separate textures for each variant
- Green design for Density mace![Mace colors]
- Yellow design for Breach mace
- Clean and minimal look
- Improved visibility in PvP
- Lightweight and smooth performance
![Mace colors](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/1adb3752f657768c8a34240a5bb8291e5b2f4802_0.webp)

Note :
**_Check out [Nanzo PVP Essentials ](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/nanzo-pvp-essentials-!!) for more clean and competitive PvP visuals._**
